q17.text: What part of engineering are you most excited about?

q22.text: What role do internships or co-op experiences play in your educational and career plans?

q36.text: Have you ever considered studying abroad as part of your academic journey?

q37.text: Are you involved in any leadership roles or student organizations related to your field?

q40.text: Do you enjoy your engineering coursework?

q44.text: What do you do if there's a problem or argument in your group project?
options: Ask for help from someone else to sort it out

q51.text: Have you ever felt like you don't belong or aren't good enough in your engineering studies?

q53.text: Are there specific academic or personal achievements that have positively impacted your emotional well-being?

q55.text: Have you experienced any fears or concerns about your future career during your engineering studies?

q60.text: Have you considered pursuing further education or additional skills outside of engineering to enhance your career flexibility?

q61.text: How do you perceive the importance of having a backup plan for your career?

q67.text: Do you do anything to help yourself feel good mentally?

q68.text: How often do you feel like college stuff is too much for you?

q72.text: How often do you do things to help yourself relax when you're stressed?

q79.text: If yes, how much time do you dedicate to improving those skills or interests each week?
